user_request_mode: per-case explicit request string from manifests/cmu_manifest.csv
notes: This transport variant routes the benchmark through AiHubMix's OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
The target model for this config is gemini-2.5-pro (Google Gemini 2.5 Pro, stable release).
AiHubMix base_url replaces OpenRouter's default endpoint.
The MACE configuration remains locked to the least-pressure macOS setting: cpu + small + float32 + no dispersion.
API key is read from the AIHUBMIX_API_KEY environment variable (via llm_api_key_env_var).
